name: Inherit Tags
description: Inherit Tags keeps your Obsidian tagging consistent. When you create a note while a tag is selected in Notebook Navigator, that tag is added to the new note's frontmatter automatically — nested tags included. Also includes a conversion tool that converts existing files that use inline #tags (e.g. from Bear), and converts the inline tags into frontmatter metadata. Notebook Navigator must be installed for the auto-tagging feature. (The inline tag converter works without it.)
author: theronypony
